ogTitle: Sexton vs Shailer Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sexton and Shailer Park.
heading: Sexton vs Shailer Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sexton, Queensland and Shailer Park, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shailer Park has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Sexton (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sexton or Shailer Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sexton has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Shailer Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sexton scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Shailer Park scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sexton or Shailer Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shailer Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
